title: Healthcare Fraud Detection
description: ML pipeline detecting fraudulent Medicare claims using XGBoost and SHAP for explainable, transparent AI-driven fraud scoring.
modalSubtitle: Machine Learning · Capstone Project · Jan – Apr 2025
overview: Built a machine learning pipeline to detect fraudulent Medicare claims by analyzing complex patterns across inpatient, outpatient, and beneficiary data. The goal was an explainable AI system that could both flag fraud and provide transparent reasoning.

sections.heading: What I Built
bullets: Implemented anomaly detection to identify behavioral patterns indicative of healthcare insurance fraud
Developed an AI-driven fraud risk scoring system using XGBoost for high-accuracy predictions
Integrated SHAP for transparent, interpretable fraud detection and explainable AI output
Reduced operational costs and improved resource allocation by enabling targeted investigation of high-risk claims
